messages.content: By the hammer! What DON'T I sell, friend? I've got elven blades that've sung through a thousand battles, dwarven ale that'd put hair on a goblin's chin, and maps to treasures that might still be there if you're quick enough. What catches yer eye?

Ahhh, the Steelbiter! Fine choice. That beauty was forged in the heart of Mount Thunder by Bronn Ironhand himself. Normally I'd ask 500 gold, but for a face I like... let's say 450. And I'll throw in a scabbard!
Too expensive?! That's masterwork! Tell ya what — I can see you're a person of taste. 400 gold, and you owe me a drink next time you're in town. But that's my final offer, or I'm losing coin on it!

Well now, I've been running this shop for sixty-seven years — since I was a lad of eighty! Started with a cart of pickaxes and now look at me! Two floors, a basement, and a very surly guard-cat named Nugget. Traveled to every corner of the realm collecting these beauties.

Potions! Right this way. Got healing draughts from the High Elves of Silverbark — 50 gold a bottle. Also got a... *looks around* ...love potion that I'm not technically licensed to sell. 200 gold, no refunds. What do you say?
What's the strangest thing in your shop?

Strangest thing? *chuckles* Right over here. This orb. Found it in the Sunken Temple of Aq'Ul. Fella who sold it to me said it shows you yer future for exactly three seconds, then goes dark for a month. Works about half the time. 75 gold. I call it the 'Maybe-Orb'.
Can you lower the price on this shield?
Lower the price?! That shield stopped a dragon's breath! Literally! The scorch marks are right here! *taps shield* Look, I can do 320 instead of 350. But I'm eating the loss on this one, friend.
Where did you get this map?

That map... *lowers voice* Came from a dying adventurer. Poor sod stumbled into my shop, handed it to me, said 'the treasure is real' and collapsed. I checked — it leads to the Tomb of the Serpent King. I'd go meself but me knees aren't what they used to be. Your adventure, 100 gold.
